metadata.title:
ct REAL ESTATE
SPECTATOR


PAY UP

pages.raw_text:
laying water mains on the north
side for some real estate man in a
newly laid out addition, the people
of Brownies addition, the hill side
and other additions pay for the lay
ing of this pipe on the promoters
property. In nearly all other cities
the owner of the property is COM
PEELED to pay 81 per foot for the
laying of the mains.


In fact, Jones or Smith are reap
ing a harvest at the expense Of the
tax payers. When water reaches
their land it doubles the latter in
value, but makes no difference on
the assessed valuation.


A resolution, 1t is stated by an
official, will be presented to the
council within the near future to
stop this policy of the city paying
for water mains laid for the benefit
of real estate men and paid for by
the tax payers.
